title: Thermochemical Fluids in Greenhouse Farming
subtitle: MANUALE di TRAINING
description: A training manual presenting the structure, technology and results of the TheGreefa Horizon 2020 project, focusing on the use of thermochemical fluids (TCF) for climate control and drying in greenhouses. It covers conceptual design, demonstration sites, case studies, life-cycle and economic assessments, and policy recommendations for greenhouse applications in diverse climatic regions.
